entity.summary: Fully on-chain order-book decentralized exchange protocol with active deployments including Base and Monad.
entity.notes: The Clober V1 and V2 candidate rows are represented under this parent entity. The official application remains reachable and V2 protocol data reports current TVL, fees, and substantial recent trading volume.

evidence.title: Clober official exchange application
evidence.notes: First-party on-chain order-book exchange application remains reachable.

evidence.title: Clober V2 protocol profile and metrics
evidence.notes: Protocol profile identifies Clober as an on-chain order-book DEX and reports current multi-chain activity and recent volume.
